title: Fruit of Life and MIA S2s Split
display_title: Fruit of Life and MIA S2s Split
wikitext:
[]: Re: Eva Unit-03 and its ... [Spoilers!]             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Jun 21, 2010 1:26 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: It doesn't exist anyomore? Surely they didn't obtain he S2 engine from Samshel but there's still the 3rd Angel that was in their hand for quite some time it's possible that they must have taken a sample or at least the data (keep in mind that apparently Seele recreated the S2 engine after the 04 incident using the data stored in the 3rd Branch).

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 22, 2010 1:57 am Well, as far as I know the Fruit of Life and the S2 engine were just two different way to refer to the same thing; I'm not sure but the first time they mentioned the "Fruit of Life" in the "canonical" continuity was in the EoE (Episode 26) until that point they simply called S2 engine following the theory of Dr. Katsuragi; the theory of Dr. Katsuragi could be absent (we'll have to wait at least until the 3.0 is released) but the concept even if with a different name is still present.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 23, 2010 8:40 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Well, as far as I know the Fruit of Life and the S2 engine were just two different way to refer to the same thing; I'm not sure but the first time they mentioned the "Fruit of Life" in the "canonical" continuity was in the EoE (Episode 26) until that point they simply called S2 engine following the theory of Dr. Katsuragi; the theory of Dr. Katsuragi could be absent (we'll have to wait at least until the 3.0 is released) but the concept even if with a different name is still present.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Wed Jun 23, 2010 9:25 am Azathoth wrote: The concept of the Fruit of Life is still present, yet the S2 engine was referred to several times by this point in the series. In Rebuild, it isn't. The most interesting thing is the lack of mention surrounding the explosion of Unit 04, but it also goes unmentioned for Shamshel, Adam, everything.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Wed Jun 23, 2010 11:34 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: They could have simply dropped the name S2 engine because it was a way to give a mechanical explanation to some metaphysical idea, something that it's not needed anymore considering most of the viewers already know about the story, so far I don't see hints that could let us think that they've completely changed the idea of the Fruit of Life.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sun Jun 27, 2010 1:01 pm Azathoth wrote: The most obvious thing is that Unit 01 does not apparently need to absorb anything from the Angel to go into over-9000 territory. It just kind of...gets infinite power from somewhere. You could maybe argue that Unit 01 doesn't need the Fruit of Life to do what it does...but unbreakable AT field, halo, power wrist made of light, eyebeams...flight? They're the sort of things that are associated with Angels, with the Fruit of Life. Unit 01 also busts them out, yet apparently it has no Fruit of Life.*.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Jun 27, 2010 8:48 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: Actually they were something that EVAs could do even without the S^2 engine/Fruit of Life; take the EVA-02 that could make that cross attack like the one used by Sachiel and Zeruel in EoE

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jun 28, 2010 2:39 am Azathoth wrote: In Unit 02's case, the light has no actual effect on the surroundings; it's just light.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jun 28, 2010 12:25 pm Is this thread still about Eva-03 and its XXX?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Jun 28, 2010 2:01 pm Hyper Shinchan wrote: No, that won't do it because in NGE only EVA-01 (and 02 for that short amount of time could berserk); 00 stopped moving (in two occasion) after berserking, so Berser isn't the same as endless (or additional) power source; the fact that it was under Shinji control is something that make this "activation" different, but unless you want to assume that it's the pilot who's going to power up the unit, that's so "Gurren Lagann" but I was actually thinking about it, it's not something that I'd exclude).

[]:             Quote Post by Rathalos » Mon Jun 28, 2010 8:07 pm I won't bother reading anything on a forum that is over a paragraph long. IMA TWO LAZEH!1!!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 1:35 am Azathoth wrote: Occam's Razor doesn't apply to fiction, where the most likely correct solution is not the simplest but the one that the author desires. (I'm not entirely convinced it applies to reality, either, but never mind that.) I'm not trying to find the simplest explanation (which is "Anno has no fucking idea what he's doing") but rather to get a feel for what Anno is driving towards. And I feel like if he wanted to say that the S2 engine is still the Fruit of Life, he would have said so by now.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jun 29, 2010 1:42 am Rathalos wrote: I won't bother reading anything on a forum that is over a paragraph long. IMA TWO LAZEH!1!!

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 2:16 am Sachi wrote: You'll last long in a discussion forum for sure.

[]:             Quote Post by Rathalos » Tue Jun 29, 2010 8:03 am I really don't mind that much. Besides, I never did too well in any forum.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 29, 2010 8:55 am @Azathoth I also have some doubt of the absence of the therm "S² Engine" in the rebuild and the implication this have, it is clear that it was intentionally omited in the dialos about the incident with unit 04. However, the fictional system created by Anno: [S² Engine, Core, Soul, At-Field, Organic Beam] Is a very well logically developed and a bruscal change in it would need a whole change in the system and the other elements. While the S² Engine is intentionally omited, the fact that "they were testing a way to surpass the activation time limit (i.e. Energy source)" That Ritsuko states in 2.22 is still present so i suspect it could simple be a change of therms since the second impact is obviously MUCH different this time and they cut the Katsuragi expedition explanation and his theories. Also i have a different view of you about the source of power of the Evas, the S² Engine is just a inifinite power source, without energy evas can't move, however, in episode 19 Eva Unit 01 moved even tough without energy, coicidentaly it is the first time we hear the heartbeat of Eva and Unit 01 opens it's mouth, sugesting it started breathing: metabolic working. Are you familiar with this theory? That the Evas being organic entitys can still produce energy through metabolism? Anyway, Even tough we do not directly see the pentagonal orange waves jsut after unit 01 awakes in episode 19, it still sugested that it was able to expand her at field: the moment she waves her arm in the air: We see a blur in the air and then the At Field of zeruel is broken, i doubt it was just because of the Air pressure lol. The blur in the air is sugested to be the expansion of the At Field in several different moments of the series. Also, you should remember that Ayanami expand the "Strongest AT Field ever detected" together with Kaworu's to stop him in episode 24 even tough is knwon that she does not possess a S² Engine. What i have always sugested is that the S² Engine is not related with the expansion of the At Field and the Power of the evas, but only, directly what is stated canonically: A energy source. The At Field power is directly related with the energy/power of the soul, how it works tough it's not exactly known, the most accepted theory in the forum is that the power of the eva is due to it's matter being different, stated "PWM" by Ritsuko. I found this theory weird and prefer to believe the power is directly related and expanded by the Core of the Angel (sugestin that Rei does hold a core), but that is an old discussion and i don´t want to start it again. ----------------------------- @Rathalos you should go back to twitter or Xchan then (usgh), we are still a part of the internet ta values deep debate and literature and are not lazy about it, forums are a traditional form of quality discussions, and inevitably they will have over a couple dozens of characters and several paragraphs.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 10:39 am I'm perplex about one thing: metabolism can be an explanation only if the EVA had something to metabolize, what was she metabolising to activate? She didn't "eat" anything before the activation, or could it be that EVA use photosynthesis or something similar? There's also the issue that if this was the case then EVAs weren't under complete control to begin and there wasn't anything of so amazing in these incidents.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Tue Jun 29, 2010 11:00 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: I'm perplex about one thing: metabolism can be an explanation only if the EVA had something to metabolize, what was she metabolising to activate?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 11:48 am SaltyJoe wrote: An Eva could always use her own tissues for metabolism, that is, breaking down and consuming her own PWM. Actually, that would explain pretty neatly why Eva-01 couldn't go around berserking for indefinite amounts of time before obtaining an S^2.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 02 » Tue Jun 29, 2010 11:56 am Note Rebuild is supposed to make Eva more "mass-population" friendly, so referring to s2 engines in Rebuild might contribute to its complexity, you dont want to throw people off like that. Hell, if I saw 1.01 first and not the series I prob wouldnt like it. I dont like everything being spelled out. They might hold off before exploring the complexities of infinite energy, a reason s2 is not menetioned in Rebuilt [yet].
